intent.description: Get booking/fare details and bookable options for a specific selected flight itinerary on Google Flights.
intent.userSaid: clicked one of the one-way fares to find more details and booking details; saw the options for another flight; chose round trip fares; kept exploring round trip fare details

parameters.name: origin
parameters.description: Origin airport IATA code for the outbound leg, e.g. SJC

parameters.name: destination
parameters.description: Destination airport IATA code for the outbound leg, e.g. SAN

parameters.name: return_date
parameters.description: Return date in YYYY-MM-DD. Empty/omit for a one-way booking.

parameters.name: outbound_flight
parameters.description: Selected outbound flight as 'carrier number', e.g. 'WN 3489'

parameters.name: return_flight
parameters.description: Selected return flight as 'carrier number' (round trip only), e.g. 'WN 3540'. Empty for one-way.

parameters.name: flight_token
parameters.description: Opaque per-itinerary booking token minted by the search_flights tool's flight_token output for the selected itinerary.
